prestazioni: Engine: 2.5L TFSI (EA855 Evo, **DAZA** engine code) – Full **APR Stage 3+ turbo system** with **Garrett GTX3582R Gen II** turbocharger (1.05 A/R turbine housing, billet compressor wheel), **APR CNC-ported cylinder head**, **Mahle Motorsport forged pistons** (9.0:1 compression), **Manley H-beam connecting rods**, **ARP Custom Age 625+ head studs**, **034 Motorsport billet crankshaft pulley**, **Bosch Motorsport 0227100208 high-flow fuel injectors**, **AEM 380LPH in-tank fuel pump**, **APR carbon fiber intake manifold**, **Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate**, **Tial Q 50mm blow-off valve**, **NGK 97506 Iridium IX spark plugs (gapped at 0.022")**, **APR ECU/TCU software (93 octane map with 1.5 bar peak boost, 6,500 RPM redline, aggressive ignition timing advance)**

Drivetrain: **034 Motorsport Stage 3+ clutch kit (multi-plate sintered metal, 700 Nm torque capacity)**, **South Bend Clutch dual-mass flywheel delete**, **034 Motorsport transmission mount insert (solid aluminum)**, **APR limited-slip differential (helical gear, 40% lockup under load)**, **034 Motorsport rear subframe reinforcement kit**, **Brembo GT 6-piston front calipers (380mm two-piece rotors, RS7-derived pads)** with **Goodridge G-Stop braided stainless steel brake lines**

Suspension/Handling: **Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (30-way adjustable damping, 20mm adjustable ride height, spherical top mounts)**, **034 Motorsport adjustable front sway bar (25mm hollow, 3-position adjustable)**, **034 Motorsport rear sway bar (22mm solid)**, **SuperPro adjustable front control arms (polyurethane bushings, 1.5° adjustable camber)**, **034 Motorsport rear subframe bushings (solid aluminum)**, **H&R wheel spacers (20mm front, 25mm rear)**, **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (245/30R19 front, 265/30R19 rear on **BBS LM-R II 19x9.5 ET35 front / 19x10.5 ET40 rear wheels**)**, **APR carbon fiber front splitter (3-piece, adjustable dive planes)** with **APR rear diffuser (GT4-style, 3D carbon fiber)**
estetica: Exterior: **APR GT4 Widebody Kit (carbon fiber fenders, front/rear bumpers, side skirts – 50mm wider front, 70mm wider rear)**, **APR carbon fiber hood (vented, 50% weight reduction)**, **APR carbon fiber roof (full replacement, OEM-spec fitment)**, **APR carbon fiber rear wing (GT4-spec, 3D adjustable angle, 1,200mm span)**, **VMR V710 19x10.5 ET40 wheels (matte gunmetal, concave design, 5x112 PCD)**, **Litchfield carbon fiber side mirrors (GT3-style, heated, power-folding)**

Interior: **Recaro SPG XL bucket seats (carbon fiber shell, FIA-approved 6-point harnesses, Schroth Profi II harnesses)**, **Sparco carbon fiber steering wheel (350mm diameter, Alcantara grip, quick-release hub)**, **Rollcage: **Custom 8-point T45 steel roll cage (MCS Motorsport, FIA-spec, bolt-in with harness bar)**, **AEM CD-7 dash display (10.1" touchscreen, CAN bus integration, lap timer, boost/vacuum gauge, oil temp/pressure, AFR, EGT)**, **Schroth 4-point harnesses (ASM2, FIA-approved, quick-release)**, **Custom Alcantara door cards (RS3-derived, carbon fiber door pulls)**

Lighting/Aero: **Lux H8 V4 LED headlights (5,000K, adaptive, OEM+ fitment)**, **Morimoto XB LED fog lights (5,500K, projector-style)**, **APR carbon fiber side blades (GT4-spec, functional air curtains)**, **APR carbon fiber rear diffuser (GT4-style, 3D design, integrated brake cooling ducts)**, **Custom titanium exhaust system (Akrapovic Evolution Line, 76mm dual outlets, titanium tips, resonated center section)**
